_comment: Declarative ntfy endpoint registry. Adds an endpoint = adds an entry here. The topic list comes from src/topics.json (declarative source-of-truth, mirrors topic-scanner.py CONFIGURED_TOPICS until a future refactor unifies them).
_upstream_status: Public ntfy at https://rss.diegonmarcos.com (auth=ntfy-3tier per build.json). Internal port: ntfy.app:8090. Per-topic message reads (/<topic>/json?poll=1) are anonymous-readable per ntfy's auth-default-access:read-write. Admin endpoints require bearer.

auth._note: ntfy uses its OWN bearer tokens (tk_xxx), distinct from Authelia OIDC bearers. Token obtained via: curl -u admin:$NTFY_ADMIN_PASSWORD -X POST http://oci-apps:8090/v1/account/token. The whole rss.diegonmarcos.com domain is gated by Authelia (auth=ntfy-3tier in the service build.json) AND ntfy itself, so the snapshot pattern is to bypass Caddy via SSH tunnel: BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8090 ./build.sh after `ssh -fN -L 8090:127.0.0.1:8090 oci-apps`.

endpoints.name: account
endpoints.description: Current account info — requires bearer; may be 401 anonymous

endpoints.name: topic
endpoints.description: Per-topic message snapshot (poll mode = non-blocking, returns current cached messages then closes; ntfy returns NDJSON, engine slurps to JSON array)
